name: Talent Property Group Limited
summary: Talent Property Group Limited, an investment holding company, invests in, develops, and manages real estate properties in the People's Republic of China. It also provides cleaning services. The company was formerly known as Tomorrow International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Talent Property Group Limited in May 2011. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Tsim Sha Tsui East, Hong Kong. Talent Property Group Limited is a subsidiary of Talent Trend Holdings Limited.
